steps.script: () => { const q=s=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)); const txt=e=>(e&&e.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const body=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' '); const A=q('a').map(a=>({t:txt(a).slice(0,32),href:a.getAttribute('href')||''})); const bad=A.filter(a=>!a.href||a.href==='#'||a.href.indexOf('javascript')===0); const btn=q('a,button').filter(e=>/shop|guide|read|discover|promise/i.test(txt(e))).map(e=>({t:txt(e).slice(0,32),href:e.getAttribute('href')||null})); return {url:location.href,h1:q('h1').map(txt).slice(0,3),announcement:txt(document.querySelector('[class*=announcement]')).slice(0,140),promiseStrip:/30.?day|free returns|matching scrunchie|first dress promise/i.test(body),heroImg:!!document.querySelector('[class*=banner] img,[class*=hero] img,.slideshow img'),cta:btn.slice(0,8),anchors:A.length,badLinks:bad.slice(0,25)}; }

() => { const q=s=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)); const txt=e=>(e&&e.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const body=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' '); const has=re=>re.test(body); let acc=[]; q('details,[class*=accordion],[class*=collapsible],.product__accordion,collapsible-tab').forEach(d=>{const s=d.querySelector('summary,[class*=title],button,h2,h3'); acc.push({label:txt(s).slice(0,40),open:d.hasAttribute('open')||/open|active|expanded/i.test(d.className),len:txt(d).length});}); const pe=document.querySelector('[class*=price__regular],[class*=price-item],.price,[class*=price]'); const atc=document.querySelector('button[name=add],[class*=add-to-cart],product-form button[type=submit]'); const an=q('a').map(a=>a.getAttribute('href')||''); return {url:location.href,h1:q('h1').map(txt).slice(0,2),price:txt(pe).slice(0,40),proofLine:has(/100% premium cotton/i),promiseStrip:has(/30.?day|try.?on|matching scrunchie|first dress promise/i),shipping2:has(/within 2 days/i),shipping3:has(/within 3 days/i),freeShipUS:has(/free shipping across the us/i),founderMelina:has(/melina/i),founderStudio:has(/from the studio|a note (from|on)/i),reviewsWidget:!!document.querySelector('.jdgm-rev-widg,[class*=jdgm]'),reviewText:has(/customer reviews|based on \d+ reviews/i),effortless:has(/effortless/i),daydream:has(/daydream/i)||an.some(h=>/daydream/i.test(h)),accordions:acc,addToCart:atc?{label:txt(atc).slice(0,30),disabled:atc.disabled===true}:null,gallery:q('[class*=media] img,[class*=gallery] img,.product__media img').length,badLinks:an.filter(h=>!h||h==='#').length}; }

() => { const q=s=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s)); const txt=e=>(e&&e.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const dr=document.querySelector('cart-drawer,#CartDrawer,[class*=cart-drawer],[class*=drawer]'); const body=((dr?dr.innerText:document.body.innerText)||'').replace(/\s+/g,' '); return {drawerFound:!!dr,drawerOpen:!!dr&&(/is-open|active|open/i.test(dr.className)||dr.offsetParent!==null),items:q('[class*=cart-item],[class*=cart__item]').map(i=>txt(i).slice(0,60)).slice(0,6),promiseInDrawer:/30.?day|matching scrunchie|free returns|first dress/i.test(body),scrunchie:/scrunchie/i.test(body),freeShipThreshold:/away from free|for free (us )?shipping|free shipping over|\$\d+ .*free/i.test(body),express:{shoppay:!!document.querySelector('[class*=shop-pay],[aria-label*="Shop Pay"]'),paypal:!!document.querySelector('[class*=paypal]'),applepay:!!document.querySelector('[aria-label*="Apple Pay"],[class*=apple-pay]')},checkoutBtn:!!document.querySelector('[name=checkout],[class*=checkout]')}; }
